news.title: ASX rises after Wall Street gains on inflation data; BHP, Rio jump
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket finished stronger on Wednesday, shrugging off another rise in oil prices, after an unexpectedly sharp slowdown in US inflation fuelled gains on Wall Street.

news.title: ASX set to edge up, Wall Street rises as oil prices swing
news.snippet: US stocks are gaining ground following strong profit reports from BlackRock and other big companies and an update on the path of inflation.

news.title: Labor threatens oil giants with emergency offshore clean-up levy
news.snippet: The oil and gas sector is on notice that Labor will have ‘no hesitation’ extending an emergency levy to fund a $200 million offshore clean-up bill if required.

news.title: Sydney firm faces liquidation over missing $17 million, fake bonds
news.snippet: The corporate regulator is seeking to wind up Sydney investment firm Capital Guard, raising concerns about the company’s handling of investor funds.

news.title: How China’s EV boom spun dangerously out of control
news.snippet: China never intended to create so many carmakers. Now the electric vehicle explosion could backfire on Beijing.

news.title: Rio2 breathes new life into Canadian critical minerals project
news.snippet: Rio2 Limited has dusted off its dormant Canadian tungsten project, with strong historical results and soaring demand for critical minerals driving a fresh exploration push.

news.title: Lindian nails 98% rare earths recovery in independent tests
news.snippet: Lindian Resources says Australian-based ANSTO has confirmed 98% recoveries and non-radioactive mixed rare earths carbonate from its Kangankunde rare earths concentrate in Malawi.
